title: telis cariensis
intro: Telis cariensis, also known as the Caries Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Telis cariensis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption, and its leaves can be used in traditional remedies.
